workspace.name: IDIOMEX MISSION CONTROL
workspace.subtitle: The operating system that runs AI-first service businesses.
workspace.welcome: It isn’t a chatbot. It isn’t a dashboard. It behaves like a business partner.
workspace.status: Decision-first operating system with command layer and dedicated CRM, workforce, knowledge, and finance rooms

sync_status.note: This cockpit is accessible anywhere once hosted, but edits still stay in this browser until a backend such as Supabase is added.

command_header.recommended_after: Use the dedicated rooms to go deeper without turning the homepage back into a long report.

decision_centre.title: Finish Cycle Matter (highest leverage)

decision_centre.next_action: Move the strongest accountant opportunity into proposal now instead of spreading effort across low-conviction leads.

decision_centre.title: Ignore the remaining 12 leads until tomorrow
decision_centre.next_action: You have 14 leads. Ignore 11. Contact the 3 with the clearest path to cash and momentum.

company_brain.headline: The Company Brain protects attention, surfaces leverage, and tells you what to do next.
company_brain.thesis: Do not read everything. Decide faster. Protect the work that moves revenue, delivery, and repeatability.

summary_cards.label: Primary Move
summary_cards.note: Highest leverage because it creates the installation template for future clients.

summary_cards.label: Revenue Move
summary_cards.note: Fastest path to near-term cash this week.

recommendations.title: Complete the Cycle Matter knowledge layer first
recommendations.why: This is the bottleneck between active work and a reusable onboarding system you can sell again.
recommendations.do_now: Finish the missing docs, then move straight into testing.
recommendations.outcome: Unblocks deployment and creates your future install template.

recommendations.title: Send the XYZ Accountants proposal before starting new outreach
recommendations.why: A live proposal is worth more than another hour of broad prospecting.
recommendations.do_now: Use the existing template and get the proposal out today.
recommendations.outcome: Best chance of immediate weekly revenue.

recommendations.title: Actively ignore low-conviction leads until tomorrow
recommendations.why: The wrong work feels productive while quietly killing momentum.
recommendations.do_now: Leave the 12 weaker leads untouched and re-rank them tomorrow.
recommendations.outcome: Protects focus for the two moves that actually matter today.

watchlist.title: Cycle Matter testing readiness
watchlist.detail: As soon as the docs are complete, the install should move into testing without another planning loop.

watchlist.title: MTD accountant offer clarity
watchlist.detail: The shortlist stays strong only if the offer page and positioning stay sharp and specific.

watchlist.title: Repeatable onboarding asset
watchlist.detail: Every delivery improvement should be converted into a template, playbook, or case study asset.

ignore_for_now.title: Broad lead list cleanup
ignore_for_now.detail: Do not reorganise or research the lower-quality lead pool today.

ignore_for_now.title: Extra Mission Control polish
ignore_for_now.detail: Avoid UI tinkering that does not improve revenue, delivery, or repeatability this afternoon.
ignore_for_now.until: After Cycle Matter and proposal are done

briefing.title: Good morning, Navod.
briefing.detail: The Company Brain says today is not about doing more. It is about finishing the two moves that create leverage: Cycle Matter and the XYZ proposal.

briefing.title: Yesterday: 2 new leads found
briefing.detail: That matters only if the top 3 are moved forward. The rest should stay out of sight until tomorrow.

briefing.title: Cycle Matter is the template, not just the client
